actions.name: Weltgeist
actions.description:
The user gains @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-effects.z7BfyuquHkly9OfK]{Protected} until the beginning of their next activation.

While under the effects of @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-effects.z7BfyuquHkly9OfK]{Protected} as a result of this move, the user counters incoming damaging attacks and inflicts damage equal to the damage that would have been inflicted on the user if they had not been @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-effects.z7BfyuquHkly9OfK]{Protected}.
